summary: UI Fixes verification (iteration 50): All backend APIs pass (8/8). All frontend UI features verified working. pt-16 navbar spacing, hamburger menu Sceneggiature item, fallback poster, release notes v0.110 - all implemented correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI fixes from v0.110 verified: 1) pt-16 spacing keeps EmergingScreenplays title visible below navbar (y=76px), 2) Hamburger menu shows 'Sceneggiature' item with Pen icon, 3) Dashboard SCENEGGIATURE card visible, 4) Fallback poster API (force_fallback=true) returns base64 image, 5) Release notes v0.110 present, 6) FilmWizard has both 'Genera Locandina AI' and 'Locandina Classica' buttons at step 9, 7) Non-blocking locked banner implemented, 8) Pydantic error handling fixed.

backend_apis.notes: Returns data:image/jpeg;base64 for action, comedy, horror genres

frontend_ui.notes: Title at y=76px, properly below navbar on desktop and mobile
Found in hamburger menu with Pen icon
Both AI and Locandina Classica buttons at lines 1305-1310
Banner at line 1410 with Avanti button
Pydantic validation errors handled at lines 669-672
